goal: eval ep_length >= 400 on tomato soup can @ 5N (deterministic, 5 eps)

experiments.result: eval=24.8 @300k, training ep_len=30.8 still rising, RETRY
eval=18.2 @300k, FAIL — worse than baseline. C3 resolved: n_steps=512 wins.
eval=17.6 @150k (1N force), 1N behaves same as 5N — force NOT primary bottleneck
eval=25.8 @150k (5N fine-tune on 1N warm-start), modest +1 over exp1 at same budget, RETRY
PARTIAL. eval ep_len 16–20 with force=0 — confirms drop is policy-induced not force-induced.
SUCCESS. eval ep_len 100.2 @ 275k (vs prior best 25.8). Breakthrough at ~200k steps. 23D raw joint ctrl + survival bonus.
eval=37.2 @ 300k, steady climb, no breakthrough. 22D EE-delta + 3-term reward (NO survival bonus). Better than exp1 but far below exp5.
eval=35.4 @ 300k. Matches shitter run within noise — reproducible.

C1.statement: PPO + 45D obs can learn to hold better than random, given enough gradient updates

C2.statement: Curriculum on force_mag (low -> high) reaches target ep_length faster than fixed-force

C3.statement: n_steps=512 beats larger n_steps at fixed 300k budget

C4.statement: Lower INTERP_STEPS_PER_KF increases fps without hurting grasp stability

C5.statement: Per-step survival bonus (+0.1 while held) unlocks learning
C5.reason: exp5 eval 100.2 vs exp1 24.8. Removing it in exp6 dropped performance back to ~37.

C6.statement: 22D EE-delta action space (PDF item 6) beats 23D raw joint ctrl
C6.reason: exp6 eval 37 vs exp1 25 at same 300k budget without survival bonus. Helps, but minor compared to survival bonus.

C7.statement: EE-delta action space + survival bonus compound — each addresses a different failure mode

key_finding: Two independent unlocks: (a) survival bonus (+0.1/step) provides the positive gradient to stay-alive; (b) EE-delta action space prevents the policy from wiggling the arm. exp5 had (a) without (b) and hit 100. exp6 had (b) without (a) and hit 37. exp7 should combine both.
arc_2_goal: Combine EE-delta + survival bonus, explore reward tuning and longer training, run experiments in parallel on shitter + 3090 overnight.
